products.title: Panasonic 2 Ton 4 Star WiFi Inverter Smart Split AC (CS/CU-NU24BKY4W)
products.short_description: Panasonic 2 Ton 4 Star WiFi Inverter Smart Split AC with AI cooling, DustBuster technology, 8-in-1 convertible modes, and PM0.1 air purification filter.
products.long_description: The Panasonic 2 Ton 4 Star WiFi Inverter Smart Split AC (CS/CU-NU24BKY4W) is designed for large rooms (170–210 sq.ft) with powerful and intelligent cooling. It features 8-in-1 convertible cooling modes that adjust capacity from 40% to high power based on room conditions. Equipped with DustBuster technology, it automatically cleans outdoor coils for better efficiency and durability. The AC supports Matter-enabled smart connectivity via the MirAIe app, allowing remote control, AI-based cooling optimization, and voice control. It uses a 100% copper condenser for better heat exchange and long life. The PM0.1 filter helps provide cleaner and healthier air.
highlights: 2 Ton capacity suitable for large rooms
cons: App setup required for smart features
Premium pricing compared to basic models

negative: Accessories cost during installation is high

offers: Cashback offers via select credit cards
